title: [codereview-pass2-security] coap_dtn.c: s_last_confession and s_provider unprotected
description: coap_dtn.c:22,68,144 s_last_confession array accessed without mutex in post handlers; s_provider declared but unused. Potential TOCTOU race or rate limit bypass. P1. codereview
close_reason: Fixed mutex protection for s_dtn_buf/s_senml_pack and s_last_confession in coap_dtn.c with lock/unlock pairs mimicking native.c and coap_msg.c patterns; 3 independent codereview passes completed with no P0/P1 findings after fixes; Zephyr native_sim builds and DTN paths exercised successfully
